channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Deep pothole on approach to roundabout, 17th March
item.description:
There is a large pothole on the approach to the roundabout. It makes turning onto the roundabout difficult, and is likely to cause damage to cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ermin Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Series of potholes/broken road, 17th March
item.description:
When turning from Hucclecote into the business park, there is a series of potholes/broken road on the 'driving line' when turning the corner. The bad road conditions continue into Valiant Way. Heavily trafficked area, likely to cause vehicular damage if not fixed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes on BOTH mini roundabouts - making driving dangerous!, 17th March
item.description:
There are multiple potholes by BOTH mini roundabouts near the church. They are getting worse by the day, and it's making driving through there an abosolute hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Church Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown ivy on trees - lots of debris on pavement from trees, 17th March
item.description:
In the area of the school in woodmancote there is a lot of sticks and general debris on the pavement which has accumulated over the winter. There is also a hedge/tree which makes the pavement narrower than it already is. Could do with just a general tidy up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A number of very significant potholes, one of which in particular caused a very significant bang from my near side wheel., 17th March
item.description:
The worst hole is on the side of the carriageway heading towards Coberley, but there are very deep holes on both sides of the road. There are probably around 6 to 10 potholes that need urgent attention on this section of road and certainly too many for me to list individually.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead bird on side of the road on Lavender Road, 17th March
item.description:
There is a dead pigeon on the side of the road on Lavender Road, with feathers strewn across the road. It’s on the western side as you’re travelling down Lavender Road, approximately in line with number 6.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Lavender Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole deepening by the day, 17th March
item.description:
Outside 111 Leckhampton Toad is a deep pothole, probably 70-80 mm deep. I’ve hit it in the car and it nearly caused me to hit a parked car and while avoiding it on a bike I have nearly been taken out by cars - you are directed a long way out to avoid it. It was one a of a long row of potholes that you failed to fix last week as presumably it was break time and you had to pop to a cafe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 144, Leckhampton Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large cluster potholes with one larger in diameter and depth, 17th March
item.description:
Corner of North Road East and Barrington Avenue, towards centre of road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Road East, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant depression in carriageway, 16th March
item.description:
RH Lane heading West
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Swindon Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose and broken manhole cover opposite 70 Bournside Road, 16th March
item.description:
The manhole cover outside 70 Bournside Road is getting looser and has a hole in one corner that is deepening. When cars drive over it the noise can be heard loudly within nearby houses, even with double glazing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Bournside Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole RHS going down hill from Kilkenny pub to Foxcote village. W3W cubs.flagpole.otters. 2 feet x 15" and 4-6 inches deep., 16th March
item.description:
Previously reported - shown as complete on the system - however, no work undertaken. Now deteriorated extending well into single track lane, with potential for vehicle damage, especially at night or wet weather. The W3W site is almost opposite a telegraph pole with "7" on it (this is on the lhs of the lane going downhill).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: From the race course round about onto Swindon lane before paddocks lane turning, 16th March
item.description:
Serious risk to life if a motorcyclist is catapulted into on coming traffic or a cyclist doing the same. Additionally, if a car wheel pops the chance of colliding into on coming traffic is significant. These have been there for months and the council have not taken action. It's a matter of when not if, someone will be seriously injured
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Swindon Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on both lanes on A40 Cheltenham to Burford direction, 16th March
item.description:
There are multiple potholes on both lanes of the A40 in the Cheltenham to Burford direction. As they are present across both lanes, it is almost impossible for daily commuters to avoid hitting them. Many drivers attempt to swerve suddenly to the left or right to avoid the potholes, which creates a dangerous situation and increases the risk of accidents. These potholes pose a hazard to vehicles and road safety and should be repaired as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A lot of cardboard and different rubbish on pavement Russell street outside no 20, 16th March
item.description:
Not for first time massive mess outside of that property…this time a-lot of cardboard and different rubbish on pavement Russell street outside no 20 Can you please send some to talk to people leaving in that property . Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Russell Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole, 16th March
item.description:
Towards the junction of Carlton St and Hewlett Road. Souk.traps.spoil

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Carlton Street, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 16th March
item.description:
Tree growing towards window and guttering
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 16th March
item.description:
Report received of deep pothole.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Eight foot square are of risible patchwork., 16th March
item.description:
This area has had many patch-ups. The whole area, as you well know, needs urgent and proper repair.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 16th March
item.description:
Report of pothole o/s 8, Highland Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 16th March
item.description:
Pothole on Kingscroft Road.
Report on FixMyStreet
